name: Jason Yates, My Faith Votes
subject: Important Deadline
body:
Make a stand for the future of our faith

View this email in your browser

Dear Peter,

You've probably heard that practicing
Christians comprised 33% of the electorate on November 8th. This
was the highest share of the presidential election in the modern
era!

Your faith made the difference. Now, in the
same faith, you and I must pursue a prosperous future for our
children and grandchildren.

My Faith Votes has a bold plan for 2017 and
beyond to fight for a future in which…

Religious freedom is valued
The sanctity of life is protected
Our judicial system champions truth and
justice
The family is honored and supported
Opportunity is abundant for all

But this work cannot move forward without
you… because you are My Faith Votes.

That's why I'm asking
for your gift today to help My Faith Votes reach an important
December 31 deadline to keep our faith at the front of the
national debate!

Be assured, election night was not the end
for My Faith Votes. It was truly just the beginning. Together,
we must - and we will - continue our work to make our faith
matter.

You've helped with the hard work to secure
our nation's best future with your vote. Now it's vital to step
into 2017 to pursue our children's and grandchildren's prosperous
future with our faith.

Thank you for giving your best gift today!

God bless you!

Jason Yates, CEO
My Faith Votes

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 11, 2015.

name: Democrats.org
subject: If you want to thank President Obama
body:
Thanks, President Obama
---
**We're so thankful for everything we've accomplished together -- and we wanted to give you the opportunity to say "thanks, Obama" yourself. Just add your note here, and we'll pass it along:

** **[THANKS, OBAMA](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+THANKS+OBAMA&utm_campaign=em_20161228_ew_nd&source=em_20161228_ew_nd")**
Whoever came up with the phrase "you don't know what you've got 'til it's gone" never met President Barack Obama.

The President's charisma, dedication, vision, and wisdom together embody everything that the term "presidential" brings to mind. His poise and steadiness continue to inspire all of us here at DNC HQ -- especially now, as we prepare to fight back against everything that Trump and his administration will try to get away with in the coming year.

Life without President Obama in the White House will be... different. But I don't plan on waiting until he leaves office to appreciate everything he's done to help keep America moving forward these past eight years -- and neither should you.

**So if you're just as proud and appreciative of our President as I am, add your name to say "thanks, Obama" right now:**

**[http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Thank-You-President-Obama1?keycode=&firstname=\(null\)&lastname=\(null\)&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+httpmydemocratsorgThankYouPresidentObama&utm_campaign=em_20161228_ew_nd&source=em_20161228_ew_nd")**

Thanks,

Eric

name: Senator Barbara Mikulski
subject: I will never stop working to elect more women
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7780/24c69fd9/ffda9aa4/18ef3d18/1206554640/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFRX30N_digital_email_20161228_Mikulski_n-all&source=WPEFRX30N_digital_email_20161228_Mikulski_n-all")
---

Peter,

Before I retire from the Senate in January, I want to tell you something:

Thank you so much for having my back all these years.

When I first ran for the U.S. Senate in Maryland, the party leaders doubted that a woman could raise the money needed to win. They wanted to go the safer route, with a man.

The EMILY's List community helped me break a barrier as the first Democratic woman to win a Senate seat in her own right. You then made sure that even though I was the first, I was not the last.

Six years later EMILY's List sent me four new sisters in the Senate, and from then on our numbers have only continued to grow. But our work's not done -- not even close.

**[Become an EMILY's List member before the end of December to help elect even more pro-choice Democratic women to the Senate.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7780/24c69fd9/ffda9aa4/18ef3d19/1206554640/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161227_email_Membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+if+consinConsGroup4503Renew+your+EMILYs+&utm_campaign=WPEFRX30N_digital_email_20161228_Mikulski_n-all&source=WPEFRX30N_digital_email_20161228_Mikulski_n-all")**

This year EMILY's List sent four new women to the Senate, and three of them are women of color.

These are former prosecutors, legislators, and a governor: women who are used to fighting for justice and who are going to stand up to the Republican majority to protect America's women and families.

But they need more sisters working alongside them to make sure women's voices are at the decision-making table, to keep equal pay moving forward, to ensure that women have access to the health care they need, and to do so much more.

I may be retiring soon, but I will never stop working to elect more women.

EMILY's List has been there for me every step of the way, and now I'm going to be there for the next wave of EMILY's List women.

So for this next cycle and the ones to follow, I'm going to put on my lipstick, square my shoulders, and get ready to help EMILY's List candidates win.

Are you with me?

**Become an EMILY's List member before the end of the year, and let's help elect more pro-choice Democratic women:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/2017-Membership](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7780/24c69fd9/ffda9aa4/18ef3d1a/1206554640/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161227_email_Membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorg2017Membership&utm_campaign=WPEFRX30N_digital_email_20161228_Mikulski_n-all&source=WPEFRX30N_digital_email_20161228_Mikulski_n-all")**

Thanks for being part of this wonderful community, and for everything you've done.

Senator Barbara Mikulski

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7780/24c69fd9/ffda9aa4/18ef3d1b/1206554640/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161227_email_Membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFRX30N_digital_email_20161228_Mikulski_n-all&source=WPEFRX30N_digital_email_20161228_Mikulski_n-all")

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to become a 2017 member, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over three million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.
---

|

body:
Peter,

We're just a few days away from the inauguration! Because of your effort and commitment, Missouri will soon have a Navy SEAL and an outsider as governor. Eric is hard at work preparing to change politics as usual and shake up the status quo. In the days leading up to the inauguration, he'll be traveling the state on a Thank You Tour, meeting with supporters and discussing his plan to fight for Missourians. We'd be honored to have you join the governor-elect as we begin to take Missouri in a new direction.

name: Jessica O'Connell, EMILY's List
subject: Be a part of this, Peter
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7073/24c69fd9/fffe08c8/18ef3798/1411455492/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WPEFRX31N_digital_email_20161228_JOCmem_n-allc&source=WPEFRX31N_digital_email_20161228_JOCmem_n-allc")
---

Peter,

With Republicans running both chambers of Congress and Donald Trump in the White House in 2017, we're facing the biggest threat to women's rights we've seen in decades.

As a pillar of the progressive movement, the EMILY's List community must fight back.

So this week, we're launching our biggest membership drive EVER. We want to break our record of new and renewed memberships to show we're strong enough to take on the big fights coming our way.

**[Donate right now to become a 2017 EMILY's List member and be a part of the fight to protect women's rights.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7073/24c69fd9/fffe08c8/18ef3799/1411455492/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161227_email_Membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+right+now+to+if+consinConsGroup45&utm_campaign=WPEFRX31N_digital_email_20161228_JOCmem_n-allc&source=WPEFRX31N_digital_email_20161228_JOCmem_n-allc")**

With Donald Trump as president, congressional Republicans will have a rubber stamp for any extreme legislation they pass. They're already planning on privatizing Medicare and defunding Planned Parenthood.

In 2017, Republicans will run both legislative chambers in 32 states and hold 33 governorships. We can definitely expect the attacks on women, reproductive health care, and abortion rights to increase.

I'm not going to lie: It's more than a little scary.

But we don't back down from fights, and when times get tough we get to work.

**Be a part of our biggest membership drive ever and send a message that we're ready for the fights ahead. Donate now to become a 2017 EMILY's List member:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/2017-Membership](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7073/24c69fd9/fffe08c8/18ef379a/1411455492/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161227_email_Membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorg2017Membership&utm_campaign=WPEFRX31N_digital_email_20161228_JOCmem_n-allc&source=WPEFRX31N_digital_email_20161228_JOCmem_n-allc")**

Thanks,

Jess O'Connell
Executive Director, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c7073/24c69fd9/fffe08c8/18ef379b/1411455492/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20161227_email_Membership?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WPEFRX31N_digital_email_20161228_JOCmem_n-allc&source=WPEFRX31N_digital_email_20161228_JOCmem_n-allc")

\---
If you've donated recently, with a different email address, or offline to become a 2017 member, thank you! It can take several days to process memberships, but don't worry, we have it recorded.

|
